rule_text: AP Financial Code defines 'Contract' to include any kind of undertaking — written or verbal, expressed or implied — by a non-Government person/syndicate/firm to construct, maintain or repair works, supply stores, or perform services in connection with works/stores execution.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 6 — definition of 'Contract'
verification_method: Foundational definition; treat verbal/implied agreements with same legal status as written contracts when applying AP Financial Code rules
